title: Block Steak Matrix
description: A modern, minimalist glassmorphic implementation of classic arcade block-stacking logic. Running cleanly within standalone client-side browser layers, the platform instantiates pseudo-random geometric tile cluster structures cascading down an indexed vertical grid tracking column. Players manipulate coordinates using matrix rotation algorithms centered around an index axis, sliding setups horizontally while checking for boundary axis constraints. Completed solid rows are parsed instantly to compute line cleanses and add score point increments, backed natively by local storage arrays.
